title: Phone Book
prompt:
Write a Hemlock program using `@stdlib/collections` HashMap to implement a simple phone book. Import HashMap from @stdlib/collections.

1. Create a HashMap and add these entries: "Alice" -> "555-0101", "Bob" -> "555-0102", "Charlie" -> "555-0103", "Diana" -> "555-0104"
2. Look up and print "Alice: 555-0101"
3. Check if "Eve" exists and print "Eve found: false"
4. Remove "Charlie" and print "size: 3"
5. Update Bob's number to "555-9999" and print "Bob: 555-9999"
expected_output:
Alice: 555-0101
Eve found: false
size: 3
Bob: 555-9999
